package rulecoverage

func NegativeCiMissingGoTestRace() string {
    ruleID := "ci_missing_go_test_race"
    family := "idioms"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Repository automation that does not visibly run `go test -race` for Go code."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
